title: CrispSourLambLeg
description: A quick and flavorful French dish featuring halal-friendly lamb leg marinated in tangy spices before grilling for a crisp exterior and savory interior.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix Levain Powder with red wine vinegar, white sugar, sesame seeds, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Rub the marinade evenly over all sides of the lamb leg. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or up to overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat (400°F). Remove lamb from marinade, pat dry with paper towels.
Place lamb on a rack in a sheet pan. Sprinkle with cayenne pepper if desired. Grill until cooked through, about 15-20 minutes per side for medium-rare internal temperature.
Grill sesame seeds and sprinkle them over the top of the lamb leg before serving.
